briefdescription.para: Default register settings that differ from the (power-on-)reset values.

detaileddescription.para: This array consists of pairs with the first value the register number and the second number the register value.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 IICBaseAddress, u8 IICAddress, u8 *BufPtr, int NumRegs)
memberdef.name: Si5324_DoSettings

briefdescription.para: Send a list of register settings to the Si5324 clock generator.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC master device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si5324 device.
is a pointer to an array with alternating register addresses and register values to program into the Si5324. The array length must be at least 2*NumRegs.
contains the number of registers to write.

simplesect.para: SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_IIC for IIC access failure, SI5324_ERR_PARM when the number of registers to write is less than one.
Private function. Does not modify the contents of the buffer pointed to by BufPtr.

briefdescription.para: Reset the SiliconLabs Si5324 clock generator.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC master device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si5324 device.

simplesect.para: SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_IIC for IIC access failure.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the SiliconLabs Si5324 clock generator.

detaileddescription.para: After initialization, the clock generator is not generating a clock yet. Call si5324_set_clock to start the clock generator.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC master device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si5324 device.

simplesect.para: SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_IIC for IIC access failure.

briefdescription.para: Find the closest rational approximation for the N2_LS/N3 fraction.

parameterdescription.para: Holds the N2_LS/N3 fraction in 36.28 fixed point notation.
Holds the maximum denominator (N3) value allowed.
Will store the numinator (N2_LS) found.
Will store the denominator (N3) found.

briefdescription.para: Search through the possible settings for the N2_LS parameter.

detaileddescription.para: Finds the best setting for N2_LS and N3n with the values for N1_HS, NCn_LS, and N2_HS already set in settings.

parameterdescription.para: Holds the settings up till now.

simplesect.para: 1 when the best possible result has been found.

briefdescription.para: Find a valid setting for N2_HS and N2_LS.

detaileddescription.para: Finds the best setting for N2_HS, N2_LS, and N3n with the values for N1_HS, and NCn_LS already set in settings. Iterates over all possibilities of N2_HS and then performs a binary search over the N2_LS values.

parameterdescription.para: Holds the settings up till now.

simplesect.para: 1 when the best possible result has been found.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the valid range for NCn_LS with the value for the output frequency and N1_HS already set in settings.

parameterdescription.para: Holds the input and output frequencies and the setting for N1_HS.

simplesect.para: -1 when there are no valid settings for NCn_LS, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Find a valid setting for NCn_LS that can deliver the correct output frequency.

detaileddescription.para: Assumes that the valid range is relatively small so a full search can be done (should be true for video clock frequencies).

parameterdescription.para: Holds the input and output frequencies, the setting for N1_HS, and the limits for NCn_LS.

simplesect.para: 1 when the best possible result has been found.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 ClkInFreq, u32 ClkOutFreq, u8 *N1_hs, u32 *NCn_ls, u8 *N2_hs, u32 *N2_ls, u32 *N3n, u8 *BwSel)
memberdef.name: Si5324_CalcFreqSettings

briefdescription.para: Calculate the frequency settings for the desired output frequency.

parameterdescription.para: contains the frequency of the input clock.
contains the desired output clock frequency.
will be set to the value for the N1_HS register.
will be set to the value for the NCn_LS register.
will be set to the value for the N2_HS register.
will be set to the value for the N2_LS register.
will be set to the value for the N3n register.
will be set to the value for the BW_SEL register.

simplesect.para: SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_FREQ when the requested frequency cannot be generated.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 IICBaseAddress, u8 IICAddress, u8 ClkSrc, u32 ClkInFreq, u32 ClkOutFreq)
memberdef.name: Si5324_SetClock

briefdescription.para: Set the output frequency of the Si5324 clock generator.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the IIC master device.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the Si5324 device.
selects the clock input to use.
contains the frequency of the input clock (2kHz-710MHz).
contains the desired output clock frequency (2kHz-945MHz).

simplesect.para: SI5324_SUCCESS for success, SI5324_ERR_IIC for IIC access failure, SI5324_ERR_FREQ when the requested frequency cannot be generated, SI5324_ERR_PARM when the ClkSrc or ClkDest parameters are invalid or the ClkInFreq or ClkOutFreq are out of range.

briefdescription.para: This file contains low-level driver functions for controlling the SiliconLabs Si5324 clock generator as mounted on the KC705 demo board.

detaileddescription.para: The user should refer to the hardware device specification for more details of the device operation.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 hf 2014/10/10 First release 1.10 MG 2016/07/05 Updated LOCKT register 1.11 YH 2016/09/14 Add option to enable fast switching 1.12 YH 2017/07/19 Added SI5324 control using PS IIC 1.13 GM 2017/11/15 Issued powerdown on CLKIN1 & CLKIN2 depending on Free Run Mode to force correct clock selection
